title: Pumpkin and Greek Yogurt Stuffed French Toast
description: A delicious twist on the classic French toast, filled with the sweetness of pumpkin and the tanginess of Greek yogurt.
instructions: In a shallow dish, whisk together eggs and milk.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Dip each bread slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides.
Place the bread slices on the skillet or griddle and cook for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Flip the French toast and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, in a small bowl, mix together pumpkin puree and cinnamon.
Spread a tablespoon of the pumpkin mixture onto each bread slice.
Top with a dollop of Greek yogurt and a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Drizzle with maple syrup and top with caramelized bananas.
